violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as yogurt and milk) in the 3-door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as milk and yogurt during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
Vegetables and were observed stored on the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
